Commencer le parcours
Filmmaking Language Library

Le manuel rapide du plan cinematographique IA.

Une reference centrale pour relier intention narrative, cadrage, composition, angle, focale, mouvement, lumiere, couleur et construction de prompt.

Explorer les fiches Construire un prompt
Categories
8
Fiches
83
Prompts complets
6
Reference centrale

Du sens du plan au prompt IA.

Cette bibliotheque rassemble les decisions de realisation dans un ordre de travail unique : intention, distance, composition, angle, focale, mouvement, lumiere, couleur, puis prompt.

  1. 01 Intention
  2. 02 Shot Size
  3. 03 Angle
  4. 04 Composition
  5. 05 Lens
  6. 06 Movement
  7. 07 Lighting
  8. 08 Color
  9. 09 AI Prompt

06 fiches

Narrative Intention

Choose what the shot must make the audience understand before choosing a lens, angle or movement.

Regle de prompt

Start every prompt with the dramatic function: emotion, power, knowledge, purpose, tension or subtext.

Intention emotion

Character Emotion

The inner state the audience must read through posture, gaze, spacing and rhythm.

Effet
Creates empathy and tells the viewer how close they are allowed to get to the character.
Usage
close-ups / decision beats / reaction shots / image-to-video holds
Image prompt
Video prompt
Notions liees
  • close-up
  • soft-light
  • slow-push-in
Modules relies
  • Prompt Builder
  • Scene Construction
Intention power

Power Dynamics

The visible balance of control between a character, another figure, an object or a space.

Effet
Makes dominance, vulnerability, pressure or resistance visible before dialogue explains it.
Usage
low angles / blocking / dialogue coverage / hero shots
Image prompt
Video prompt
Notions liees
  • low-angle
  • symmetry
  • 35mm
  • push-in
Modules relies
  • Scene Construction
  • Camera shots reference
Intention suspense

Audience Knowledge

The amount of information the viewer has compared with the character inside the scene.

Effet
Creates suspense, surprise, irony or curiosity by controlling what is shown, hidden or delayed.
Usage
reveals / over-the-shoulder shots / foreground framing / POV
Image prompt
Video prompt
Notions liees
  • reveal-shot
  • frame-within-frame
  • over-the-shoulder
Modules relies
  • Storyboard / Shot-list
  • Shot List Builder
Intention scene function

Scene Purpose

The job of the scene in the sequence: introduce, reveal, escalate, decide, transition or resolve.

Effet
Keeps shot choices functional and prevents decorative images from replacing story beats.
Usage
storyboards / shot lists / sequence planning / prompt chains
Image prompt
Video prompt
Notions liees
  • insert-shot
  • medium-shot
  • shot-list
Modules relies
  • Storyboard / Shot-list
  • Shot List Builder
Intention tension

Narrative Tension

The unresolved pressure between what a character wants, what blocks them and what may happen next.

Effet
Turns stillness into anticipation and gives slow AI video a reason to feel alive.
Usage
slow push-ins / negative space / low key lighting / withheld reveals
Image prompt
Video prompt
Notions liees
  • negative-space
  • low-key
  • push-in
Modules relies
  • Camera Motion Library
  • Storyboard / Shot-list
Intention subtext

Subtext

The meaning underneath the visible action: what the character feels or hides but does not state.

Effet
Adds emotional depth and makes quiet shots useful because the frame carries a second layer of meaning.
Usage
profile shots / close-ups / symbolic inserts / held reaction shots
Image prompt
Video prompt
Notions liees
  • profile
  • insert-shot
  • rim-light
Modules relies
  • Scene Construction
  • Prompt method
09 fiches

Shot Sizes

Compare how distance changes intimacy, context and readable action while keeping the same subject constant.

Regle de prompt

Name the exact shot size. Do not rely on vague words like cinematic, dramatic or beautiful.

Sujet constant : Lyra Voss, same matte black tactical outfit, same rain-soaked Vertical Silence concrete corridor, weak cyan practical light, blue-grey night atmosphere, consistent face and proportions, standing still beside the same damaged access marker, wet concrete floor, vertical shaft in the background
Shot Size shot size

Extreme Wide Shot

Shows the subject as a small part of a much larger environment.

Effet
Scale, isolation and world pressure become stronger than facial emotion.
Usage
establishing geography / solitude / arrival / massive locations
Image prompt
Video prompt
Notions liees
  • negative-space
  • 18mm
  • solitude-image-prompt
Modules relies
  • Camera shots reference
  • Shot List Builder
  • Prompt Builder
Shot Size shot size

Wide Shot

Shows the full environment while keeping the subject readable.

Effet
Balances character and world so the viewer understands where action can happen.
Usage
scene geography / blocking / reveals / walk-ins
Image prompt
Video prompt
Notions liees
  • 35mm
  • rule-of-thirds
  • shot-list
Modules relies
  • Camera shots reference
  • Shot List Builder
  • Prompt Builder
Shot Size shot size

Full Shot

Frames the whole body from head to toe.

Effet
Reveals posture, costume and readiness without losing the character in the space.
Usage
costume continuity / body language / entry beats / stance
Image prompt
Video prompt
Notions liees
  • 35mm
  • rule-of-thirds
  • shot-list
Modules relies
  • Camera shots reference
  • Shot List Builder
  • Prompt Builder

Expanded from the existing camera-shots reference collection.

Shot Size shot size

Medium Wide

Frames roughly from knees or thighs upward with enough set around the body.

Effet
Keeps action readable while starting to privilege the character over the location.
Usage
dialogue setup / movement starts / power stances / AI video stability
Image prompt
Video prompt
Notions liees
  • 35mm
  • rule-of-thirds
  • shot-list
Modules relies
  • Camera shots reference
  • Shot List Builder
  • Prompt Builder
Shot Size shot size

Medium Shot

Frames the body from waist or torso upward.

Effet
Connects gesture, face and immediate context without becoming intimate.
Usage
dialogue / object interaction / reaction plus gesture / scene beats
Image prompt
Video prompt
Notions liees
  • 35mm
  • rule-of-thirds
  • shot-list
Modules relies
  • Camera shots reference
  • Shot List Builder
  • Prompt Builder

Expanded from the existing camera-shots reference collection.

Shot Size shot size

Medium Close Up

Frames from chest or shoulders upward.

Effet
Increases emotional access while keeping posture and eyeline readable.
Usage
controlled emotion / decision beats / subtext / dialogue intensity
Image prompt
Video prompt
Notions liees
  • 35mm
  • rule-of-thirds
  • shot-list
Modules relies
  • Camera shots reference
  • Shot List Builder
  • Prompt Builder
Shot Size shot size

Close Up

Frames the face as the primary information.

Effet
Makes emotion and micro-expression dominate the shot.
Usage
empathy / reaction / recognition / identity control
Image prompt
Video prompt
Notions liees
  • 85mm
  • character-emotion
  • soft-light
Modules relies
  • Camera shots reference
  • Shot List Builder
  • Prompt Builder

Expanded from the existing camera-shots reference collection.

Shot Size shot size

Extreme Close Up

Frames a very small detail such as an eye, hand, mouth or texture.

Effet
Transforms a detail into a narrative event.
Usage
clues / fear / texture / micro-reveals
Image prompt
Video prompt
Notions liees
  • 35mm
  • rule-of-thirds
  • shot-list
Modules relies
  • Camera shots reference
  • Shot List Builder
  • Prompt Builder

Expanded from the existing camera-shots reference collection.

Shot Size shot size

Insert Shot

Cuts to an object or body detail that carries story information.

Effet
Gives a clue, action or decision visual priority.
Usage
props / clues / hands / continuity details
Image prompt
Video prompt
Notions liees
  • scene-purpose
  • audience-knowledge
  • rack-focus
Modules relies
  • Camera shots reference
  • Shot List Builder
  • Prompt Builder
11 fiches

Camera Angles

Keep the scene constant and change only the camera height, axis or viewpoint to alter psychology.

Regle de prompt

Specify camera position relative to the subject, not just the emotional adjective.

Sujet constant : Lyra Voss, same matte black tactical outfit, same rain-soaked Vertical Silence concrete corridor, weak cyan practical light, blue-grey night atmosphere, consistent face and proportions, standing at the base of the same monumental concrete shaft, one red access marker at frame left, rain mist, identical pose and lighting
Angle angle

Eye Level

Camera is placed at the subject's eye height.

Effet
Feels neutral, direct and human; the viewer meets the character as an equal.
Usage
honest dialogue / neutral observation / character grounding
Image prompt
Video prompt
Notions liees
  • scene-purpose
  • composition
  • shot-list
Modules relies
  • Camera shots reference
  • Scene Construction
  • Storyboard / Shot-list
Angle angle

High Angle

Camera looks down toward the subject.

Effet
Can make the character feel vulnerable, observed or constrained by the space.
Usage
vulnerability / surveillance / smallness
Image prompt
Video prompt
Notions liees
  • scene-purpose
  • composition
  • shot-list
Modules relies
  • Camera shots reference
  • Scene Construction
  • Storyboard / Shot-list
Angle angle

Low Angle

Camera looks upward toward the subject.

Effet
Adds authority, threat or heroic weight, depending on context.
Usage
power / hero shots / intimidation
Image prompt
Video prompt
Notions liees
  • power-dynamics
  • 35mm
  • push-in
Modules relies
  • Camera shots reference
  • Scene Construction
  • Storyboard / Shot-list

Expanded from the existing camera-shots reference collection.

Angle angle

Bird's Eye View

Camera looks straight down from above.

Effet
Turns the scene into a map and can make the character feel trapped or strategic.
Usage
geography / ritual / isolation
Image prompt
Video prompt
Notions liees
  • scene-purpose
  • composition
  • shot-list
Modules relies
  • Camera shots reference
  • Scene Construction
  • Storyboard / Shot-list
Angle angle

Worm's Eye View

Camera is extremely low, looking sharply upward.

Effet
Makes architecture or the character feel monumental and physically imposing.
Usage
monumentality / threat / scale
Image prompt
Video prompt
Notions liees
  • scene-purpose
  • composition
  • shot-list
Modules relies
  • Camera shots reference
  • Scene Construction
  • Storyboard / Shot-list
Angle angle

Dutch Angle

Camera is intentionally tilted off level.

Effet
Creates unease, instability or psychological fracture.
Usage
disorientation / danger / corrupted space
Image prompt
Video prompt
Notions liees
  • scene-purpose
  • composition
  • shot-list
Modules relies
  • Camera shots reference
  • Scene Construction
  • Storyboard / Shot-list
Angle angle

Over The Shoulder

Frames from behind one subject toward a target or second subject.

Effet
Creates relation, withheld identity and spatial tension.
Usage
dialogue / reveals / point of attention
Image prompt
Video prompt
Notions liees
  • audience-knowledge
  • rack-focus
  • medium-shot
Modules relies
  • Camera shots reference
  • Scene Construction
  • Storyboard / Shot-list

Expanded from the existing camera-shots reference collection.

Angle angle

POV

Camera adopts the subject's visual position.

Effet
Puts the audience inside the character's perception and limits knowledge to what they see.
Usage
immersion / discovery / fear
Image prompt
Video prompt
Notions liees
  • audience-knowledge
  • reveal-shot
  • handheld
Modules relies
  • Camera shots reference
  • Scene Construction
  • Storyboard / Shot-list
Angle angle

Profile

Camera sees the subject from the side.

Effet
Suggests thought, distance, secrecy or a decision happening internally.
Usage
subtext / silence / thresholds
Image prompt
Video prompt
Notions liees
  • scene-purpose
  • composition
  • shot-list
Modules relies
  • Camera shots reference
  • Scene Construction
  • Storyboard / Shot-list
Angle angle

Rear View

Camera looks at the subject from behind.

Effet
Makes the viewer follow, observe or enter the unknown with the character.
Usage
entry shots / mystery / follow moments
Image prompt
Video prompt
Notions liees
  • scene-purpose
  • composition
  • shot-list
Modules relies
  • Camera shots reference
  • Scene Construction
  • Storyboard / Shot-list
Angle angle

Symmetrical Front View

Camera faces the subject and space on a centered axis.

Effet
Feels ritualistic, controlled, confrontational or iconic.
Usage
confrontation / formal reveals / institutional spaces
Image prompt
Video prompt
Notions liees
  • scene-purpose
  • composition
  • shot-list
Modules relies
  • Camera shots reference
  • Scene Construction
  • Storyboard / Shot-list
12 fiches

Composition

Organize the frame so the audience knows where to look, what dominates and what is withheld.

Regle de prompt

Use one dominant composition principle and one support principle at most.

Composition composition

Rule of Thirds

Place le sujet et les informations fortes sur une ligne ou une intersection de tiers.

Effet
Crée une tension lisible entre le personnage, son regard et ce qui l'attend hors centre.
Usage
Utile pour préparer un raccord regard, réserver une zone au décor ou laisser entrer un mouvement dans le cadre.
Image prompt
Video prompt
Notions liees
  • wide-shot
  • character-emotion
  • 35mm
Modules relies
  • Composition course
  • Composition cheat sheet
  • Prompt Builder

Reused from src/data/composition-principles.ts.

Composition composition

Symmetry

Répartit des formes comparables de part et d'autre d'un axe clair.

Effet
Évoque contrôle, institution, rituel, enfermement ou une perfection prête à se rompre.
Usage
Idéale pour établir la géométrie d'un lieu avant de briser l'équilibre dans le plan suivant.
Image prompt
Video prompt
Notions liees
  • symmetrical-front-view
  • low-key
  • 35mm
Modules relies
  • Composition course
  • Composition cheat sheet
  • Prompt Builder

Reused from src/data/composition-principles.ts.

Composition composition

Center Framing

Aligne le sujet principal sur l'axe central pour rendre sa présence frontale et incontestable.

Effet
Produit autorité, confrontation, rituel ou immobilité sous pression.
Usage
À employer pour un face-à-face caméra, une révélation architecturale ou un plan dont la stabilité doit résister à l'animation.
Image prompt
Video prompt
Notions liees
  • symmetrical-front-view
  • scene-purpose
  • 50mm
Modules relies
  • Composition course
  • Composition cheat sheet
  • Prompt Builder

Reused from src/data/composition-principles.ts.

Composition composition

Negative Space

Réserve une grande zone peu détaillée autour ou devant le sujet.

Effet
Amplifie solitude, attente, vulnérabilité ou menace invisible.
Usage
L'espace vide doit correspondre au regard, au déplacement prévu ou à l'arrivée d'un élément dans la séquence.
Image prompt
Video prompt
Notions liees
  • extreme-wide-shot
  • narrative-tension
  • 18mm
Modules relies
  • Composition course
  • Composition cheat sheet
  • Prompt Builder

Reused from src/data/composition-principles.ts.

Composition composition

Leading Lines

Utilise les lignes du décor pour conduire le regard vers le sujet ou une information narrative.

Effet
Crée une trajectoire mentale, une menace convergente ou un appel vers le hors-champ.
Usage
Les joints du béton, rails, câbles et bandes de lumière peuvent guider le regard et préparer un travelling.
Image prompt
Video prompt
Notions liees
  • tracking-shot
  • wide-shot
  • 28mm
Modules relies
  • Composition course
  • Composition cheat sheet
  • Prompt Builder

Reused from src/data/composition-principles.ts.

Composition composition

Frame Within Frame

Utilise une ouverture ou une masse de premier plan pour encadrer le sujet.

Effet
Suggère observation, isolement, surveillance ou passage entre deux espaces.
Usage
Une porte, une dalle cassée ou un câble proche caméra crée une profondeur utile au reveal et au parallaxe.
Image prompt
Video prompt
Notions liees
  • audience-knowledge
  • reveal-shot
  • 50mm
Modules relies
  • Composition course
  • Composition cheat sheet
  • Prompt Builder

Reused from src/data/composition-principles.ts.

Composition composition

Foreground Framing

Places a near object between camera and subject to create depth, concealment or observation.

Effet
Makes the viewer feel hidden inside the scene and gives AI video parallax to animate.
Usage
reveals / surveillance / image-to-video parallax / intimate observation
Image prompt
Video prompt
Notions liees
  • frame-within-frame
  • reveal-shot
  • depth-layering
Modules relies
  • Composition course
  • Animation
Composition composition

Crowded Frame

Fills the frame with many bodies, objects or shapes so the subject must fight for attention.

Effet
Creates pressure, chaos, social density or sensory overload.
Usage
panic / markets / crowd pressure / loss of control
Image prompt
Video prompt
Notions liees
  • visual-weight
  • handheld
  • low-key
Modules relies
  • Composition course
  • Scene Construction
Composition composition

Empty Space

Leaves a large inactive area in the frame without necessarily directing the eye toward an arrival or threat.

Effet
Creates silence, absence, waiting or emotional numbness.
Usage
solitude / contemplation / aftermath / quiet transitions
Image prompt
Video prompt
Notions liees
  • negative-space
  • extreme-wide-shot
  • muted-palette
Modules relies
  • Composition course
  • Prompt Builder
Composition composition

Depth Layering

Sépare clairement premier plan, sujet, second plan et fond atmosphérique.

Effet
Donne une sensation de monde habité et transforme un cadre fixe en espace traversable.
Usage
Essentielle pour préparer parallaxe, rack focus, reveal ou déplacement latéral en image-to-video.
Image prompt
Video prompt
Notions liees
  • foreground-framing
  • tracking-shot
  • rack-focus
Modules relies
  • Composition course
  • Composition cheat sheet
  • Prompt Builder

Reused from src/data/composition-principles.ts.

Composition composition

Long Lens Isolation

Uses a longer focal length and shallow depth to separate the subject from compressed background layers.

Effet
Makes the character feel watched, trapped or emotionally sealed off from the world.
Usage
loneliness in crowds / surveillance / compressed backgrounds / emotional distance
Image prompt
Video prompt
Notions liees
  • 135mm
  • close-up
  • low-key
Modules relies
  • Camera Motion Library
  • Composition course
Composition composition

Wide Lens Isolation

Uses a wide lens close to the subject so the world stretches around them while they remain alone.

Effet
Makes isolation feel spatial and physical, not just emotional.
Usage
lonely spaces / environmental pressure / surreal proximity / wide close-ups
Image prompt
Video prompt
Notions liees
  • 18mm
  • extreme-wide-shot
  • negative-space
Modules relies
  • Camera Motion Library
  • Composition course
06 fiches

Lens Library

Focal length changes perspective, compression, intimacy and background weight even when shot size stays similar.

Regle de prompt

A close-up is not enough. Lens choice changes emotion.

Sujet constant : Lyra Voss, same matte black tactical outfit, same rain-soaked Vertical Silence concrete corridor, weak cyan practical light, blue-grey night atmosphere, consistent face and proportions, head-and-shoulders portrait kept the same size in frame, background concrete columns and cyan practical lights unchanged
Lens lens

18mm

Very wide field of view with strong perspective expansion. Low compression, deep spatial stretch, close objects enlarge quickly.

Effet
Makes the world feel physical, unstable, immersive or overwhelming.
Usage
environmental close-ups / large interiors / subject inside space
Image prompt
Video prompt
Notions liees
  • wide-lens-isolation
  • extreme-wide-shot
  • worms-eye-view
Modules relies
  • Camera Motion Library
  • Camera shots reference
  • Prompt Builder
Lens lens

24mm

Wide but more controlled than 18mm. Low-to-moderate compression, strong depth and readable environment.

Effet
Feels present, energetic and spatial without becoming extreme.
Usage
walk-and-talk / wide portraits / movement with environment
Image prompt
Video prompt
Notions liees
  • medium-shot
  • rule-of-thirds
  • eye-level
Modules relies
  • Camera Motion Library
  • Camera shots reference
  • Prompt Builder
Lens lens

35mm

Balanced wide-normal focal length common for cinematic context. Moderate depth, natural perspective, enough environment around the subject.

Effet
Feels grounded, observant and human.
Usage
story scenes / medium shots / AI video stability
Image prompt
Video prompt
Notions liees
  • medium-shot
  • rule-of-thirds
  • eye-level
Modules relies
  • Camera Motion Library
  • Camera shots reference
  • Prompt Builder
Lens lens

50mm

Normal focal length with less perspective emphasis. Moderate compression, balanced subject/background relation.

Effet
Feels direct, intimate but not overly stylized.
Usage
dialogue / neutral portraits / reference frames
Image prompt
Video prompt
Notions liees
  • medium-shot
  • rule-of-thirds
  • eye-level
Modules relies
  • Camera Motion Library
  • Camera shots reference
  • Prompt Builder
Lens lens

85mm

Short telephoto portrait lens. Noticeable compression, shallow depth, stronger subject separation.

Effet
Feels intimate, focused, emotionally selective.
Usage
close-ups / beauty without distortion / emotional beats
Image prompt
Video prompt
Notions liees
  • long-lens-isolation
  • close-up
  • character-emotion
Modules relies
  • Camera Motion Library
  • Camera shots reference
  • Prompt Builder
Lens lens

135mm

Long telephoto lens with strong compression. High compression, shallow depth, background appears closer and larger.

Effet
Feels isolated, watched, tense or emotionally sealed.
Usage
surveillance feeling / distant close-ups / compressed architecture
Image prompt
Video prompt
Notions liees
  • long-lens-isolation
  • close-up
  • character-emotion
Modules relies
  • Camera Motion Library
  • Camera shots reference
  • Prompt Builder
19 fiches

Camera Movement Library

Treat movement as narrative punctuation. AI video is more stable when one clip contains one motivated move.

Regle de prompt

One move. One clip. Default to slow movements for AI video.

Sujet constant : Lyra Voss, same matte black tactical outfit, same rain-soaked Vertical Silence concrete corridor, weak cyan practical light, blue-grey night atmosphere, consistent face and proportions, medium-wide frame in an abandoned concrete transit hall, clear foreground cables, midground subject, deep background shaft
Movement camera movement

Push In

Camera moves physically closer to the subject.

Effet
Increases attention, emotional pressure or importance.
Usage
realization / threat / decision
Image prompt
Video prompt
Notions liees
  • narrative-tension
  • close-up
  • low-key
Modules relies
  • Camera Motion Library
  • Animation
  • Shot List Builder

Related to the existing dolly-push-in prompt entry.

Movement camera movement

Pull Back

Camera moves physically away from the subject.

Effet
Reveals context, loneliness or the cost of a decision.
Usage
reveals / aftermath / scale
Image prompt
Video prompt
Notions liees
  • medium-wide
  • depth-layering
  • shot-list
Modules relies
  • Camera Motion Library
  • Animation
  • Shot List Builder
Movement camera movement

Pan

Camera rotates horizontally from a fixed position.

Effet
Shifts attention across space or reveals a relation.
Usage
searching / following eyeline / space reveal
Image prompt
Video prompt
Notions liees
  • medium-wide
  • depth-layering
  • shot-list
Modules relies
  • Camera Motion Library
  • Animation
  • Shot List Builder
Movement camera movement

Tilt

Camera rotates vertically from a fixed position.

Effet
Reveals height, hierarchy or a hidden vertical clue.
Usage
architecture / power / scale
Image prompt
Video prompt
Notions liees
  • medium-wide
  • depth-layering
  • shot-list
Modules relies
  • Camera Motion Library
  • Animation
  • Shot List Builder
Movement camera movement

Tracking Shot

Camera moves with the subject or along a path.

Effet
Creates continuity, momentum and spatial understanding.
Usage
walks / exploration / process
Image prompt
Video prompt
Notions liees
  • medium-wide
  • depth-layering
  • shot-list
Modules relies
  • Camera Motion Library
  • Animation
  • Shot List Builder
Movement camera movement

Truck Shot

Camera moves sideways while facing the subject or scene.

Effet
Creates parallax and reveals layers laterally.
Usage
layered spaces / reveals / surveillance
Image prompt
Video prompt
Notions liees
  • medium-wide
  • depth-layering
  • shot-list
Modules relies
  • Camera Motion Library
  • Animation
  • Shot List Builder
Movement camera movement

Orbit

Camera circles around the subject.

Effet
Shows a character from multiple sides and can feel dramatic or destabilizing.
Usage
hero moments / inspection / transformation
Image prompt
Video prompt
Notions liees
  • medium-wide
  • depth-layering
  • shot-list
Modules relies
  • Camera Motion Library
  • Animation
  • Shot List Builder
Movement camera movement

Arc Shot

Camera moves in a curved path, usually not a full circle.

Effet
Changes relation between subject and background while keeping a motivated path.
Usage
relationship shifts / reveals / thresholds
Image prompt
Video prompt
Notions liees
  • medium-wide
  • depth-layering
  • shot-list
Modules relies
  • Camera Motion Library
  • Animation
  • Shot List Builder
Movement camera movement

Crane

Camera rises or descends through space.

Effet
Adds scale, release or discovery through vertical movement.
Usage
establishing / arrival / vertical spaces
Image prompt
Video prompt
Notions liees
  • medium-wide
  • depth-layering
  • shot-list
Modules relies
  • Camera Motion Library
  • Animation
  • Shot List Builder
Movement camera movement

Jib

Short controlled crane-like move from a pivoting arm.

Effet
Adds elegant height change without feeling weightless.
Usage
small reveals / object-to-face moves / production value
Image prompt
Video prompt
Notions liees
  • medium-wide
  • depth-layering
  • shot-list
Modules relies
  • Camera Motion Library
  • Animation
  • Shot List Builder
Movement camera movement

Zoom

Lens changes focal length while camera stays still.

Effet
Feels observational, artificial or analytical compared with a dolly.
Usage
documents / realization / stylized emphasis
Image prompt
Video prompt
Notions liees
  • medium-wide
  • depth-layering
  • shot-list
Modules relies
  • Camera Motion Library
  • Animation
  • Shot List Builder
Movement camera movement

Dolly Zoom

Camera moves while zooming in the opposite direction.

Effet
Creates psychological disorientation and sudden dread.
Usage
shock / fear / realization
Image prompt
Video prompt
Notions liees
  • medium-wide
  • depth-layering
  • shot-list
Modules relies
  • Camera Motion Library
  • Animation
  • Shot List Builder
Movement camera movement

Handheld

Camera has human instability and small physical corrections.

Effet
Adds immediacy, fear, documentary energy or vulnerability.
Usage
panic / subjective tension / imperfect observation
Image prompt
Video prompt
Notions liees
  • medium-wide
  • depth-layering
  • shot-list
Modules relies
  • Camera Motion Library
  • Animation
  • Shot List Builder
Movement camera movement

Steadicam

Stabilized moving camera with smooth human mobility.

Effet
Feels immersive, graceful and continuous.
Usage
following characters / long takes / controlled exploration
Image prompt
Video prompt
Notions liees
  • medium-wide
  • depth-layering
  • shot-list
Modules relies
  • Camera Motion Library
  • Animation
  • Shot List Builder
Movement camera movement

Reveal Shot

Movement uncovers information that was hidden by framing, foreground or angle.

Effet
Turns space into story by delaying knowledge.
Usage
suspense / discoveries / environment storytelling
Image prompt
Video prompt
Notions liees
  • audience-knowledge
  • foreground-framing
  • truck-shot
Modules relies
  • Camera Motion Library
  • Animation
  • Shot List Builder
Movement camera movement

Follow Shot

Camera follows a moving subject from behind, side or front.

Effet
Ties the audience to the character's goal and pace.
Usage
journeys / entry beats / walking decisions
Image prompt
Video prompt
Notions liees
  • medium-wide
  • depth-layering
  • shot-list
Modules relies
  • Camera Motion Library
  • Animation
  • Shot List Builder
Movement camera movement

Match Cut

A cut connects two shots through shared shape, motion, color or composition.

Effet
Creates continuity, metaphor or elegant transition.
Usage
transitions / montage / visual rhyme
Image prompt
Video prompt
Notions liees
  • color-mood
  • scene-purpose
  • storyboard
Modules relies
  • Camera Motion Library
  • Animation
  • Shot List Builder
Movement camera movement

Whip Pan

A very fast pan creates motion blur between two directions.

Effet
Adds urgency, surprise or energetic transition.
Usage
impact transitions / sudden discoveries / comic or action rhythm
Image prompt
Video prompt
Notions liees
  • medium-wide
  • depth-layering
  • shot-list
Modules relies
  • Camera Motion Library
  • Animation
  • Shot List Builder
Movement camera movement

Crash Zoom

A fast zoom snaps attention to a subject or detail.

Effet
Feels abrupt, stylized and urgent.
Usage
shock reveals / clues / heightened style
Image prompt
Video prompt
Notions liees
  • medium-wide
  • depth-layering
  • shot-list
Modules relies
  • Camera Motion Library
  • Animation
  • Shot List Builder
11 fiches

Lighting Library

Compare emotional tone by changing only source size, direction, hardness and contrast on the same portrait.

Regle de prompt

Describe where the light comes from, how hard it is and what it reveals or hides.

Sujet constant : same close portrait of Lyra Voss, neutral expression, wet dark honey-brown hair, natural skin texture, matte black collar, simple blue-grey concrete background
Lighting lighting

Soft Light

Large diffused light with gentle shadow edges.

Effet
Feels intimate, forgiving, calm or melancholic.
Usage
portraits / memory / vulnerability
Image prompt
Video prompt
Notions liees
  • character-emotion
  • medium-close-up
  • 50mm
Modules relies
  • Lighting and color
  • Ambiance and realism
  • Prompt Builder
Lighting lighting

Hard Light

Small direct source with sharp shadows.

Effet
Feels harsh, exposed, dangerous or graphic.
Usage
interrogation / noir / threat
Image prompt
Video prompt
Notions liees
  • character-emotion
  • medium-close-up
  • 50mm
Modules relies
  • Lighting and color
  • Ambiance and realism
  • Prompt Builder
Lighting lighting

High Key

Bright low-contrast lighting with few deep shadows.

Effet
Feels open, clean, safe or artificial depending on context.
Usage
clarity / commercial style / false safety
Image prompt
Video prompt
Notions liees
  • character-emotion
  • medium-close-up
  • 50mm
Modules relies
  • Lighting and color
  • Ambiance and realism
  • Prompt Builder
Lighting lighting

Low Key

Dark contrast-heavy lighting with controlled highlights.

Effet
Feels secretive, tense, lonely or dangerous.
Usage
suspense / mystery / night scenes
Image prompt
Video prompt
Notions liees
  • narrative-tension
  • close-up
  • 85mm
Modules relies
  • Lighting and color
  • Ambiance and realism
  • Prompt Builder
Lighting lighting

Backlight

Main light comes from behind the subject toward camera.

Effet
Separates silhouette and suggests mystery, danger or revelation.
Usage
silhouettes / reveals / rain and mist
Image prompt
Video prompt
Notions liees
  • character-emotion
  • medium-close-up
  • 50mm
Modules relies
  • Lighting and color
  • Ambiance and realism
  • Prompt Builder
Lighting lighting

Rim Light

A thin edge light outlines the subject from side or back.

Effet
Adds separation, precision and iconic contour without fully revealing the face.
Usage
separation / night portraits / hero shapes
Image prompt
Video prompt
Notions liees
  • silhouette
  • backlight
  • rear-view
Modules relies
  • Lighting and color
  • Ambiance and realism
  • Prompt Builder
Lighting lighting

Practical Lights

Visible or implied light sources inside the scene motivate illumination.

Effet
Makes lighting feel believable and connected to the world.
Usage
realism / continuity / set logic
Image prompt
Video prompt
Notions liees
  • color-mood
  • soft-light
  • realism
Modules relies
  • Lighting and color
  • Ambiance and realism
  • Prompt Builder
Lighting lighting

Rembrandt Lighting

Side key light creates a small triangle of light on the shadow cheek.

Effet
Feels painterly, introspective and controlled.
Usage
serious portraits / inner conflict / classic drama
Image prompt
Video prompt
Notions liees
  • character-emotion
  • medium-close-up
  • 50mm
Modules relies
  • Lighting and color
  • Ambiance and realism
  • Prompt Builder
Lighting lighting

Silhouette

Subject is mostly dark against a brighter background.

Effet
Withholds identity and turns posture into the main information.
Usage
mystery / entrances / scale
Image prompt
Video prompt
Notions liees
  • character-emotion
  • medium-close-up
  • 50mm
Modules relies
  • Lighting and color
  • Ambiance and realism
  • Prompt Builder
Lighting lighting

Neon Lighting

Colored artificial sources create saturated accents and reflections.

Effet
Feels urban, stylized, nocturnal or emotionally heightened.
Usage
cyberpunk / wet streets / color contrast
Image prompt
Video prompt
Notions liees
  • character-emotion
  • medium-close-up
  • 50mm
Modules relies
  • Lighting and color
  • Ambiance and realism
  • Prompt Builder
Lighting lighting

Overcast Natural Light

Cloud cover creates broad soft daylight with low shadow contrast.

Effet
Feels quiet, honest, grey or documentary.
Usage
day exteriors / melancholy / neutral continuity
Image prompt
Video prompt
Notions liees
  • character-emotion
  • medium-close-up
  • 50mm
Modules relies
  • Lighting and color
  • Ambiance and realism
  • Prompt Builder
09 fiches

Color & Mood Library

Build palettes as narrative systems, not decorative filters. Keep the same scene and change only color logic.

Regle de prompt

Define dominant, support and accent colors, then explain the emotional reason.

Sujet constant : Lyra Voss, same matte black tactical outfit, same rain-soaked Vertical Silence concrete corridor, weak cyan practical light, blue-grey night atmosphere, consistent face and proportions, medium-wide frame inside the same concrete corridor, one access marker, wet floor reflections, locked composition
Color color

60 / 30 / 10 Rule

Uses one dominant color, one support color and one accent color.

Effet
Creates hierarchy, readability and production continuity.
Usage
color scripts / brand-like scenes / sequence continuity
Image prompt
Video prompt
Notions liees
  • lighting
  • scene-purpose
  • production-bible
Modules relies
  • Lighting and color
  • Production Bible
  • Prompt Builder
Color color

Orange & Teal

Contrasts warm skin or practical light against cool cyan-blue shadows.

Effet
Feels cinematic, energetic and readable when restrained.
Usage
skin separation / urban night / commercial contrast
Image prompt
Video prompt
Notions liees
  • lighting
  • scene-purpose
  • production-bible
Modules relies
  • Lighting and color
  • Production Bible
  • Prompt Builder
Color color

Blue & Yellow

Combines cold blue atmosphere with yellow warning or practical accents.

Effet
Feels investigative, alert or industrial.
Usage
warning cues / night interiors / mystery
Image prompt
Video prompt
Notions liees
  • lighting
  • scene-purpose
  • production-bible
Modules relies
  • Lighting and color
  • Production Bible
  • Prompt Builder
Color color

Red & Cyan

Pits red danger or emotion against cyan technology or cold space.

Effet
Creates alarm, conflict and synthetic tension.
Usage
danger markers / threshold moments / sci-fi tension
Image prompt
Video prompt
Notions liees
  • narrative-tension
  • practical-lights
  • insert-shot
Modules relies
  • Lighting and color
  • Production Bible
  • Prompt Builder
Color color

Green & Magenta

Uses complementary green and magenta for uncanny or contaminated mood.

Effet
Feels strange, toxic, unstable or surreal.
Usage
unreliable spaces / dream logic / corruption
Image prompt
Video prompt
Notions liees
  • lighting
  • scene-purpose
  • production-bible
Modules relies
  • Lighting and color
  • Production Bible
  • Prompt Builder
Color color

Monochrome

Restricts the image to one hue family or black-and-white values.

Effet
Focuses attention on form, texture and value instead of hue.
Usage
memory / formal studies / minimal drama
Image prompt
Video prompt
Notions liees
  • lighting
  • scene-purpose
  • production-bible
Modules relies
  • Lighting and color
  • Production Bible
  • Prompt Builder
Color color

Muted Palette

Keeps saturation low across the frame.

Effet
Feels grounded, tired, restrained or realistic.
Usage
realism / melancholy / continuity
Image prompt
Video prompt
Notions liees
  • empty-space
  • overcast-natural-light
  • solitude-image-prompt
Modules relies
  • Lighting and color
  • Production Bible
  • Prompt Builder
Color color

High Contrast Palette

Separates bright and dark values or strong color oppositions.

Effet
Feels decisive, graphic, dangerous or mythic.
Usage
poster frames / hero moments / sharp reveals
Image prompt
Video prompt
Notions liees
  • lighting
  • scene-purpose
  • production-bible
Modules relies
  • Lighting and color
  • Production Bible
  • Prompt Builder
Color color

Pastel Palette

Uses softened low-saturation colors with lighter values.

Effet
Feels fragile, dreamlike, gentle or deceptively calm.
Usage
memory / soft sci-fi / quiet aftermath
Image prompt
Video prompt
Notions liees
  • lighting
  • scene-purpose
  • production-bible
Modules relies
  • Lighting and color
  • Production Bible
  • Prompt Builder
Module final

From Cinematic Intention to AI Prompt

Le prompt final doit etre une chaine de decisions observables. Chaque couche doit servir l'intention, pas seulement ajouter du style.

Ordre recommande

Emotion -> Shot Size -> Lens -> Composition -> Angle -> Movement -> Lighting -> Color -> Style Reference -> Technical Constraints

  1. 01 Emotion
  2. 02 Shot Size
  3. 03 Lens
  4. 04 Composition
  5. 05 Angle
  6. 06 Movement
  7. 07 Lighting
  8. 08 Color
  9. 09 Style Reference
  10. 10 Technical Constraints
solitude image

Solitude - image prompt

  • loneliness
  • Extreme Wide Shot
  • 18mm
  • Negative Space
  • Eye Level
  • Soft overcast light
  • Muted Palette
tension image

  • withheld threat
  • Medium Close Up
  • 85mm
  • Frame Within Frame
  • Low Angle
  • Low Key
  • Red & Cyan

  • discovery
  • Wide Shot
  • 35mm
  • Leading Lines
  • Symmetrical Front View
  • Backlight
  • Blue & Yellow

Liens croises

Modules qui peuvent s'appuyer sur cette bibliotheque.

Prompt Builder

Turn cinematic decisions into copyable image and video prompts.

 Storyboard Generator

Use intention, shot size and movement to plan panels.

 Shot List Builder

Document each shot as a production unit.

 Camera Motion Library

Choose one motivated move per AI video clip.

 Scene Construction Tools

Connect blocking, eyeline, space and subtext.

Future Director's Toolkit

Planned hub for directors' decisions, coverage and continuity.

Future Director's Toolkit (planned)
AI Filmmaking Lab Laboratoire de production cinematographique

Apprenez à concevoir, produire et documenter des séquences audiovisuelles avec l’IA.

Prêt à créer ?

Commencez par les fondations, puis avancez à votre rythme.
